"[16] [Appended, 04:03:57] [2] RP CALLED TO CONFIRM THAT CHP IS WITH THE CORRECT PRTY - RP HELPED PUT THE FIRE OUT CONFIRMED HE IS THE DRVR"
"[9] 97-206 VEH 1124 // BO RIGHT AXEL AND RIGGHT REAR WHEEL //"
"[5] SV NOW ON RHS WB EO BEAUMONT- FIRE UNDER THE VEH"
"[2] SEMI WAS ON RHS WHEN THE TKPK TCD INTO IT"

Log.Location: "I8 E / Sr111 S I8 W Con"

details.IncidentDetail: "[2] 85-MZP1 THE #2 LANE SHUT DOWN EB I8 WO SR111 / AND SB TRANSITION ROAD / CALTRANS IS REQ I STAY STATIONARY"

"[2] VEH HIT RPS MIRROR AND CONT SB "
